prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: shared HUD chrome pack for Orbwalker
Primary request: create an opaque chroma-key source sheet for shared player HUD, HP bars, slot frames, and mastery panels.
Subject: HUD component sheet with player HP bar frame/fill, enemy HP bar frame/fill, combo badge frame, equipment slot frame, consumable slot frame, mastery panel frame, mastery preview panel frame, and compact panel frame.
Style/medium: polished stylized 2D fantasy UI chrome, clean gameplay readability.
Composition/framing: organized component sheet with clear spacing and centered pieces.
Color palette: dark stone, steel, antique gold, red and green bar fills, restrained elemental accents.
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid magenta key background #FF00FF only.
Constraints: exact one-color background #FF00FF; no checkerboard; no gradient; no texture; no vignette; no shadows touching background; no glow touching background; no particles touching background; no extra frame/panel/matte backdrop beyond the actual HUD components; no labels; no text; no logo; no watermark.
Avoid: do not use #FF00FF or near-magenta key tones inside UI artwork.
notes: Opaque chroma-key fallback source candidate only; deterministic keyed-alpha extraction required before promotion.
